lccdd.comment: AUTO-GENERATED variant: Plexiglass fill = 0.5869 X0 (199.99mm of 340.75mm X0), inside the unchanged 200.0mm TrackerECalGap envelope. Remainder of envelope is unfilled (vacuum/air). Derived from CLD_o2_v07_ARC2, which matches the true k4geo reference ECal (0.50mm Si) plus the 200mm gap insert.
Passive material insert between the Outer Tracker and the ECal barrel, for material-budget studies. Not sensitive - no readout.
